reasoning: A had the most genuinely distinct five, each inhabiting a separate conceptual space and developed with real mechanism: the metabolic creditor 'Debt Chair', the two-body pivot 'Negotiation Seat', the use-authored organism 'Chair That Eats', the platformless standing-sleep 'Vertical Rest', and the standout 'Inherited Posture' that turns sitting into a bodily archive of the dead. B is strong and explicitly names its broken assumptions, and Tide (acoustic-pressure) and The Understudy are inventive, but its Debt/Loam/Quorum overlap conceptually with A's Debt/Eats/Negotiation and two of its five (Tide, Understudy) both resolve to 'the object disappears', tightening its spread. C ranges across good spaces (Absence Chair, Borrowed Gravity) but each version is a thin one-paragraph sketch with little internal mechanism, costing it on craft and generativity.
